adminSettings.title: System Settings
adminSettings.subtitle: Runtime controls for the AVG platform. Changes take effect immediately.
adminSettings.kycToggleHint: When ON, members can buy products without a verified KYC. KYC upload is still available.
adminSettings.payoutNote: Weekly payouts always require verified KYC + bank details, regardless of this toggle. This setting only affects the purchase gate.
adminSettings.welcomeEmailToggleHint: When ON, new members receive a welcome email with their Member ID and Sponsor ID upon registration.
adminSettings.otpToggleHint: When ON, members must enter a 6-digit code sent to their email after entering their password.

counters.qualifiedTooltip: Members count toward your rank only after their own team starts building.

ranks.fulfillmentNote: Rewards are verified and fulfilled by AVG admin.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
auth.referralRequired: You need a referral link to join
auth.referralRequiredDesc: Ask your sponsor to share their referral link with you.
auth.name: Full Name
auth.termsAccept: I agree to the Terms & Conditions
auth.otpSentNotice: A 6-digit code has been sent to your email. Enter it below to continue.
auth.otpInvalid: Invalid code. Please check and try again.
auth.otpExpired: Code has expired. Please log in again.
auth.otpLocked: Too many failed attempts. Please log in again to get a new code.
auth.otpResent: A new code has been sent to your email.
auth.otpResendLimit: Too many code requests. Please try again later.
auth.otpExpiredNotice: Your code has expired — request a new one.

errors.network: Cannot reach the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
errors.server: Server error. Please try again in a moment.
errors.tooMany: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

buy.termsLabel: I agree to the Terms & Conditions and confirm this purchase
buy.successTitle: You are now an Active Member!
buy.successBody: Your product purchase has been confirmed. You can now start building your network.
buy.awaitingPaymentInstructions: Transfer the exact amount to one of the bank accounts below and quote your Order ID in the payment remarks. Then upload a screenshot of the transfer confirmation.
buy.awaitingPaymentContact: Include your Order ID and member code in the transfer remarks so our team can match your payment quickly.
buy.uploadProofHint: Take a screenshot of your bank transfer confirmation and upload it here. Management will verify and activate your account.
buy.proofRejectedHint: Please re-upload a clear screenshot of your bank transfer and submit again.
buy.proofUploaded: Payment screenshot received — our team will review and activate your account shortly.
buy.alreadyActive: Additional purchase — does not create a second activation.
buy.kycRequired: KYC verification is required before you can buy. Upload your document and wait for approval.

profile.kycUploadHint: Upload a clear photo of your PAN or Aadhaar. Required before buying — reviewed by AVG management.

uploader.badType: Only JPG, PNG or WebP images are allowed

products.title: Product catalog
products.name: Name
products.priceHint: This is the final price members pay.
products.activeHint: Visible on the member Buy Product page
products.priceInvalid: Enter a valid price in rupees
products.emptyDesc: Add your first product to show it on the Buy Product page
products.emptyDescInactive: All your products are currently active
products.deleteConfirmBody: This will permanently remove "{{name}}" and all its images. This cannot be undone.
products.deleteCannotHasOrders: Cannot delete — this product has existing orders. Deactivate it instead to hide it from the Buy page.

kyc.title: KYC Approvals
kyc.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone or member code…
kyc.noDocs: No documents uploaded yet — verify only if checked another way.
kyc.emptyDesc: All KYC submissions have been reviewed.

bank.title: Bank Approvals
bank.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone or member code…
bank.emptyDesc: No members with submitted bank details in this status.

members.noDocsWarning: No KYC documents uploaded yet — verify only if documents were checked another way.
members.kycReadOnly: KYC decisions are made by management on the KYC Approvals page.

recordPayment.title: Record Payment
recordPayment.subtitle: Manually activate a member by recording their payment on their behalf. The member will be activated and flow through the normal pair & qualification pipeline.
recordPayment.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, code, or phone…
recordPayment.alreadyActiveWarning: This member is already active. Recording another payment will not re-activate them, but the order and payment reference will still be logged.
recordPayment.proofHint: Upload a screenshot of the bank transfer confirmation. Optional — the payment reference below is required.
recordPayment.paymentRefPlaceholder: e.g. UTR number from bank transfer

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Review uploaded payment screenshots and approve to activate member accounts.
orders.confirmHint: Enter the bank UTR / transaction reference from the screenshot above.
orders.paymentRefPlaceholder: e.g. UTR number from bank transfer
orders.rejectReasonPlaceholder: e.g. Screenshot is unclear, wrong account, amount mismatch…
orders.rejectReasonHint: This reason will be shown to the member so they can re-upload.
orders.emptyDesc: Members who placed orders but haven't uploaded proof appear here.
orders.paidEmptyDesc: Orders where members have uploaded a payment screenshot appear here.
orders.confirmedEmptyDesc: Confirmed orders will appear here after payment is verified.

wallet.capNote: Weekly cap: ₹1,00,000. Excess is deferred to next week.

downline.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or member code…
downline.emptyHint: Share your referral link to grow your team

pairs.subtitle: ₹1,000 for you and every upline on each completed pair — released once you qualify

myOrders.title: My Orders
myOrders.subtitle: All products you have purchased or are in the process of activating.
myOrders.emptyDesc: Products you purchase will appear here with their activation status.
